diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -311,6 +311,21 @@
     else:

         p = nearest_by_path(env, tpos, face=True)

         if p is not None:

+            # For pickup goals (box/ball/key), Minigrid cannot pick up a new object

+            # while already carrying another one.  KeyCorridor/UnlockPickup often

+            # require carrying a key to reach the final object, then dropping it

+            # before the final pickup.  Drop into an empty neighboring cell first.

+            if getattr(env, "carrying", None) is not None and target_type != "key":

+                if front_pos(env) == p:

+                    ax, ay = agent_pos(env)

+                    for ep in neighbors4((ax, ay)):

+                        if ep != p and get_cell(env, ep) is None:

+                            if front_pos(env) == ep:

+                                return 4

+                            da = action_to_face(env, ep)

+                            if da is not None:

+                                return da

+                    return random_safe_action(env)

             if front_pos(env) == p:

                 return 3

             a = action_to_face(env, p)
